name: @elizaos/app-browser
description: Eliza app-browser: desktop browser workspace control, Steward wallet actions, and (eventually) browser UI exported for the dashboard.

ELIZA_BROWSER_WORKSPACE_URL.description: Loopback bridge URL for the Eliza desktop browser workspace.

ELIZA_BROWSER_WORKSPACE_TOKEN.description: Bearer token for the Eliza desktop browser workspace bridge.

STEWARD_API_URL.description: Base URL for the Steward wallet API used by Eliza wallet actions.

STEWARD_AGENT_TOKEN.description: Bearer token for Steward wallet signing requests.

STEWARD_API_KEY.description: Fallback API key for Steward wallet requests when no agent token exists.

STEWARD_TENANT_ID.description: Optional Steward tenant identifier for wallet requests.

ELIZA_STEWARD_AGENT_ID.description: Optional Steward agent ID override for Eliza wallet requests.
